# shadcn/ui components

This directory contains **generated** components from [shadcn/ui](https://ui.shadcn.com).

## Do not edit by hand

Changes will be lost or conflict with `npx shadcn@latest add` / `diff` on upgrade.

## Instead

- Add or update via the CLI: `npx shadcn@latest add <component>`
- Customize behavior or styling in **`src/components/app/`** wrappers
- See [docs/STYLING.md](../../../docs/STYLING.md)
